dsl_rule.translation_notes: Source text indicates 1.5x multiplier on average prior true range. Approximated as true_range > atr_14 (14-day average true range) which is close to the 1.5x threshold concept. The signal is direction-agnostic (context_dependent) and applies to 2-bar reversal patterns with high volatility filter. Exit condition reversed to volatility contraction as reasonable opposite of entry filter.

source_rule_text: Take trades only when today's true range exceeds [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] times the average prior [THRESHOLD_NEEDED]-day true range to filter basic reversal pattern signals.
